Visiting Martha & Roy in Southern Spain
 
 
One unique view of Martha's wonderful balcony.
 
 
 
At the Alhambra in Granada.
 
 
 
In Martha's kitchen, Agustine 
announces it 
must be time for paella.
Enjoying the fruits of Agustine's & Martha's labor, Roy, Adam and I feast on tapas & Muga wine.
 
 
 
Adam relishes the view & his cerveza in Cabo de Palos.
 
NB:  Our next visit to Spain will include pictures of the incredible Martha!
